name: Caviar Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 10-inch spring-form pan with a little mayonnaise.
2. Mash the eggs and mayonnaise together in a bowl until well combined, then stir in salt and pepper to taste.
3. Spread the egg mixture evenly over the bottom of the prepared pan.
4. Scatter the chopped scallions on top of the egg layer.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the cream cheese and sour cream until smooth.
6. Spread the crème cheese mixture over the scallions.
7. Refrigerate the pie if preparing ahead; it can be assembled up to 24 hours in advance.
8. Just before serving, arrange the caviar on top using wax paper for masking and toothpicks to create an attractive design.
9. Serve with plain crackers such as Carr's Table Water Biscuits.
